sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section II, List of Answers on Topics 60:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section II, List of Answers on Topics 60:1
items.html: When the emanated degree acquires its own light, from that moment it is regarded as having left the Malchut of the upper one, called Emanator, and to have come into its own authority (see answer 127).
